nasb.text: and came and lived in a city called Nazareth. This was to fulfill what was spoken through the prophets: “He shall be called a Nazarene.”

esv.text: And he went and lived in a city called Nazareth, so that what was spoken by the prophets might be fulfilled, that he would be called a Nazarene.

cnv.text: 來到拿撒勒城住下，這樣就應驗了先知所說的：“他必稱為拿撒勒人。”

ccb.text: 定居在拿撒勒镇。这应验了先知的话：“祂将被称为拿撒勒人。”

csbs.text: 来到一个叫拿撒勒的镇，住了下来。这是为要应验那藉着先知们所说的话：“他将被称为拿撒勒人。”
